verses.latin_vulgate: Salvum me fac, Domine, quoniam defecit sanctus,  quoniam diminutæ sunt veritates a filiis hominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הוֹשִׁ֣יעָה יְ֭הֹוָה כִּֽי־גָמַ֣ר חָסִ֑יד כִּי־פַ֥סּוּ אֱ֝מוּנִ֗ים מִבְּנֵ֥י אָדָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Save me, O Lord, for there is now no saint: truths are decayed from among the children of men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Davidin Psalmi, edelläveisaajalle, kahdeksalla kielellä. (H 12:2) Auta, Herra; sillä pyhät ovat vähentyneet, ja uskolliset ovat harvat ihmisten lasten seassa.
verses.king_james: Help, Lord; for the godly man ceaseth; for the faithful fail from among the children of men.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vana locuti sunt unusquisque ad proximum suum ;  labia dolosa, in corde et corde locuti sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁ֤וְא ׀ יְֽדַבְּרוּ֮ אִ֤ישׁ אֶת־רֵ֫עֵ֥הוּ שְׂפַ֥ת חֲלָק֑וֹת בְּלֵ֖ב וָלֵ֣ב יְדַבֵּֽרוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: They have spoken vain things, every one to his neighbour: with deceitful lips, and with a double heart have they spoken.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jokainen puhuu lähimmäisensä kanssa valhetta: he liehakoitsevat ja opettavat eripuraisuutta sydämistä.
verses.king_james: They speak vanity every one with his neighbour: with flattering lips and with a double heart do they speak.

verses.latin_vulgate: Disperdat Dominus universa labia dolosa,  et linguam magniloquam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַכְרֵ֣ת יְ֭הֹוָה כׇּל־שִׂפְתֵ֣י חֲלָק֑וֹת לָ֝שׁ֗וֹן מְדַבֶּ֥רֶת גְּדֹלֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: May the Lord destroy all deceitful lips, and the tongue that speaketh proud things.
verses.finnish_biblia: Katkokoon Herra kaikki ulkokullaiset huulet ja ylpiästi puhuvaiset kielet,
verses.king_james: The Lord shall cut off all flattering lips, and the tongue that speaketh proud things:

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui dixerunt : Linguam nostram magnificabimus ;  labia nostra a nobis sunt.  Quis noster dominus est ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲשֶׁ֤ר אָמְר֨וּ ׀ לִלְשֹׁנֵ֣נוּ נַ֭גְבִּיר שְׂפָתֵ֣ינוּ אִתָּ֑נוּ מִ֖י אָד֣וֹן לָֽנוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who have said: We will magnify our tongue: our lips are our own: who is Lord over us?
verses.finnish_biblia: Jotka sanovat: meidän kielemme pitää voittaman, meidän tulee puhua: kuka meidän herramme on?
verses.king_james: Who have said, With our tongue will we prevail; our lips are our own: who is lord over us?

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter miseriam inopum, et gemitum pauperum,  nunc exsurgam, dicit Dominus.  Ponam in salutari ;  fiducialiter agam in eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִשֹּׁ֥ד עֲנִיִּים֮ מֵאֶנְקַ֢ת אֶבְי֫וֹנִ֥ים עַתָּ֣ה אָ֭קוּם יֹאמַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֑ה אָשִׁ֥ית בְּ֝יֵ֗שַׁע יָפִ֥יחַֽ־לֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: By reason of the misery of the needy, and the groans of the poor, now will I arise, saith the Lord. I will set him in safety: I will deal confidently in his regard.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että köyhät hävitetään ja vaivaiset huokaavat, niin minä nyt nousen, sanoo Herra: minä saatan avun, että rohkiasti pitää opetettaman.
verses.king_james: For the oppression of the poor, for the sighing of the needy, now will I arise, saith the Lord; I will set him in safety from him that puffeth at him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Eloquia Domini, eloquia casta ; argentum igne examinatum,  probatum terræ, purgatum septuplum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִ֥מְר֣וֹת יְהֹוָה֮ אֲמָר֢וֹת טְהֹ֫ר֥וֹת כֶּ֣סֶף צָ֭רוּף בַּעֲלִ֣יל לָאָ֑רֶץ מְ֝זֻקָּ֗ק שִׁבְעָתָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: The words of the Lord are pure words: as silver tried by the fire, purged from the earth, refined seven times.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herran puheet ovat kirkkaat, niinkuin selitetty hopia saviastioissa, seitsemän kertaa koeteltu.
verses.king_james: The words of the Lord are pure words: as silver tried in a furnace of earth, purified seven times.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu, Domine, servabis nos,  et custodies nos a generatione hac in æternum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַתָּֽה־יְהֹוָ֥ה תִּשְׁמְרֵ֑ם תִּצְּרֶ֓נּוּ ׀ מִן־הַדּ֖וֹר ז֣וּ לְעוֹלָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou, O Lord, wilt preserve us: and keep us from this generation for ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä Herra, kätke ne, ja varjele meitä tästä suvusta ijankaikkisesti.
verses.king_james: Thou shalt keep them, O Lord, thou shalt preserve them from this generation for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: In circuitu impii ambulant :  secundum altitudinem tuam multiplicasti filios hominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: סָבִ֗יב רְשָׁעִ֥ים יִתְהַלָּכ֑וּן כְּרֻ֥ם זֻ֝לּ֗וּת לִבְנֵ֥י אָדָֽם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: The wicked walk round about: according to thy highness, thou hast multiplied the children of men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä joka paikka on jumalattomia täynnä, koska huonot ihmisten lasten seassa korotetaan.
verses.king_james: The wicked walk on every side, when the vilest men are exalted.
